title: habenaria norae
intro: Habenaria norae, commonly known as the Asian yellow pogonia, is a species of orchid native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The health benefits of Habenaria norae include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to manage digestive problems and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Habenaria norae typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves into teas, infusions, and tinctures.
